page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelions: The Master Guide
text:
is a guidebook for Neon Genesis Evangelions video game by Dengeki PlayStation Editorial Department. It was published by Media Works on 22 November 2003. https://www.amazon.co.jp/dp/4840225850 

Overview

Strategy book for version of Neon Genesis Evangelions. Detailed system introduction and data explanation from free turn to live daily life to battle turn to repel Angels. Full of essential knowledge to enjoy the world of "EVA2".

Table of Contents

Staff
